title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICRA - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICRA - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ICRA is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ICRA:
ICRA is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA!
